Reasoning: The current visit record primarily details diagnoses and treatments related to severe systemic infections (septicemia, septic shock, severe sepsis) and ongoing management of a kidney transplant. There is no explicit mention of any lipid abnormalities, hypercholesterolemia, or hyperlipidemia in the provided diagnoses or medications. Therefore, based strictly on the evidence provided, there is no strong and explicit basis to predict that a diagnosis of "Disorders of Lipid Metabolism" will be coded in the next hospital visit.
